ai_assistant.title: AI Assistant
ai_assistant.description: MCP server for AI assistant integration with multi-tenant support.

api_docs.title: API Documentation
api_docs.description: Auto-generated documentation for all HTTP endpoints.

api_keys.title: API Keys
api_keys.description: Manage access tokens for external API access.

audit_logs.title: Audit & Action Logs
audit_logs.description: Tracks user actions and data accesses with undo support scaffolding.

auth.title: Authentication & Accounts
auth.description: User accounts, sessions, roles and password resets.

business_rules.title: Business Rules
business_rules.description: Business Rules Engine for defining, managing, and executing business logic and automation rules.

catalog.title: Product Catalog
catalog.description: Configurable catalog for products, variants, and pricing used by the sales module.

channel_gmail.title: Gmail Email Channel
channel_gmail.description: Connect per-user Gmail accounts via OAuth2. Outbound via gmail.users.messages.send; inbound via History API polling. Pairs with the Communications Hub.

channel_imap.title: IMAP + SMTP Email Channel
channel_imap.description: Connect personal mailboxes via IMAP for inbound polling and SMTP for outbound delivery. Pairs with the Communications Hub (SPEC-045d).

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.description: Pay links, checkout templates, public payment pages, and checkout transaction tracking.

communication_channels.title: Communication Channels
communication_channels.description: Unified hub bridging external chat/email channels (Slack, WhatsApp, Email) to the Messages module. Adapter contract, channel-native payload storage, reactions, and per-channel threading.

configs.title: Configuration
configs.description: Shared configuration storage and helpers for module settings.

content.title: Content
content.description: Static informational pages such as terms of service and privacy policy.

customer_accounts.title: Customer Identity & Portal Authentication
customer_accounts.description: Customer-facing authentication with two-tier identity model and full RBAC.

customers.title: Customer Relationship Management
customers.description: Core CRM capabilities for people, companies, deals, and activities.

dashboards.title: Admin Dashboards
dashboards.description: Configurable admin dashboard with module-provided widgets.

data_sync.title: Data Sync
data_sync.description: Streaming data sync hub for import/export integrations.

dictionaries.title: Shared Dictionaries
dictionaries.description: Organization-scoped dictionaries for reusable enumerations and appearance presets.

directory.title: Directory (Tenants & Organizations)
directory.description: Multi-tenant directory with tenants and organizations.

entities.title: Custom Entities & Fields
entities.description: User-defined entities, custom fields, and dynamic records storage.

feature_toggles.title: Feature Toggles
feature_toggles.description: Global feature flags with tenant-level overrides.

gateway_stripe.title: Stripe Payment Gateway
gateway_stripe.description: Accept card payments, Apple Pay, Google Pay, and bank transfers via Stripe.

inbox_ops.title: InboxOps — Email-to-ERP Agent
inbox_ops.description: Receives forwarded emails via webhook, extracts structured action proposals using LLM, and presents them for human-in-the-loop approval.

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.description: Core integration framework — external ID mapping, status badges, and integration registry.

messages.title: Messages
messages.description: Internal messaging system with attachments, actions, and email forwarding.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: In-app notifications with module-extensible types and actions.

onboarding.title: Onboarding
onboarding.description: Self-service tenant and organization onboarding flow.

payment_gateways.title: Payment Gateways
payment_gateways.description: Payment gateway adapter contract, registry, transaction tracking, and webhook routing.

perspectives.title: Table perspectives
perspectives.description: Shared persistence for DataTable perspectives (columns, filters, saved views).

planner.title: Worktime / Availabilities
planner.description: Availability schedules, rulesets, and shared planning rules.

portal.title: Customer Portal
portal.description: Self-service customer portal framework with login, signup, dashboard, sidebar navigation, and extensible widget system.

progress.title: Progress
progress.description: Generic server-side progress tracking for long-running operations

query_index.title: Query Indexes
query_index.description: Hybrid query layer with full-text and vector search capabilities.

resources.title: Resource planning
resources.description: Assets and resources with scheduling policies.

sales.title: Sales Management
sales.description: Quoting, ordering, fulfillment, and billing capabilities built on modular pricing and tax pipelines.

scheduler.title: Scheduler
scheduler.description: Database-managed scheduled jobs with admin UI

search.title: Search
search.description: Unified search module with pluggable strategies (Meilisearch, Vector, Tokens).

shipping_carriers.title: Shipping Carriers
shipping_carriers.description: Shipping carrier adapter hub with rates, shipment creation, tracking, and webhooks.

sync_akeneo.title: Akeneo Product Sync
sync_akeneo.description: Import Akeneo PIM categories, product attributes, and products into the Open Mercato catalog.

sync_excel.title: Excel / CSV Import
sync_excel.description: File-upload-based CSV import foundation built on top of the data sync hub.

translations.title: Entity Translations
translations.description: System-wide entity translation storage and locale overlay for CRUD responses.

webhooks.title: Webhooks
webhooks.description: Standard Webhooks compliant outbound webhook delivery for platform events.

workflows.title: Workflow Engine
workflows.description: Orchestrate business processes with state machines, transitions, and activities
